projects.title: React Runtime Observatory
projects.problem: React hook behavior is usually invisible at runtime. It's hard to know exactly when effects run, what triggers re-renders, or how context updates spread across the tree.
actions: Built custom tracked hook wrappers (useState, useReducer, useEffect, useContext, useMemo) that intercept every state transition and effect execution
Designed a withRenderTracker HOC for non-invasive component render logging without modifying source components
Implemented a live event dashboard with color-coded timeline showing hook execution order and state diffs
Built filtering by event type and component name for targeted debugging of specific render paths
Added React.memo toggle to compare memoized vs non-memoized re-render behavior in real time
Created JSON trace export for offline analysis and sharing instrumentation snapshots
Managed global event store with Zustand, supporting live/pause/reset trace controls

projects.title: Gyst - Time Tracking Chrome Extension
projects.problem: Time tracking tools often feel heavy, slow, or disconnected from how developers actually work. Teams needed a browser-native solution that reduces friction while still scaling to multi-user organizations.
actions: Built Chrome Extension (Manifest V3) with background service worker for persistent timers across tabs and sessions
Implemented multi-tenant architecture with Supabase PostgreSQL and Row Level Security for secure data isolation
Designed role-based access control system (owner, admin, manager, member) with approval workflows
Created shared logic layer between full dashboard and lightweight Chrome popup
Built onboarding flow with animated spotlight tutorial for first-time users
Implemented TanStack Query for caching, syncing, and server state management
Added keyboard shortcuts, notifications, and accessibility-aware UI patterns

projects.title: Restaurant Management (PWA)
impacts: Faster order flow in daily use
projects.problem: Manual ordering and fragmented workflows slowed restaurant service.
actions: Designed PWA architecture with offline sync
Implemented real-time order flows
Added multi-tenant data model with CFA support

projects.title: Naboujastore - E-Commerce Platform
projects.problem: Traditional Senegalese clothing retailers needed a modern e-commerce platform with WhatsApp integration to serve local market preferences.
actions: Built production-ready e-commerce with Next.js 15 App Router and React 19
Implemented Vercel Analytics for real-time user behavior tracking and conversion funnel analysis
Deployed on Vercel with automatic CI/CD and optimized performance metrics
Created advanced shopping cart with React Context API and persistent state management
Integrated WhatsApp API for order processing with comprehensive event tracking
Developed African-inspired design system with Framer Motion animations and Radix UI components

projects.title: IlmQuest - Real-Time Multiplayer Quiz Game
projects.problem: Friends, families, and youth groups needed an engaging way to learn Islamic knowledge together through interactive, real-time quiz competitions.
actions: Designed join-by-code flow and host/guest lobby system
Built level picker (1-25) with clear progression
Implemented real-time game state synchronization with Socket.IO
Created playful feedback animations for correct/wrong answers
Developed live scoreboard with synchronized updates across all clients
Designed warm, community-oriented UI with mosque iconography and soft rose palette
Fully localized interface in French for target audience

projects.title: Restaurant Website
projects.problem: Site needed to showcase menu and weekly specials with speed.
actions: Implemented SSG for core pages
Built specials schedule UX
Added image optimization and caching

architecture.title: Frontend Architecture
architecture.subtitle: How I structure and build modern Next.js applications
architecture.description: Explore my architectural approach: Server Components strategy, component system design, state management philosophy, and performance optimization techniques.
